title: helichrysum maranguense
intro: Helichrysum maranguense, also known as Yellow Bush, is a shrub-like plant native to the islands of the Cabo Verde archipelago. It belongs to the Asteraceae family and is known for its golden-yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Helichrysum maranguense contains compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, including wound healing, anti-aging, and immune system support. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
